# Description

Implement this task.


# [PKT-PRV-034](task-0101): Provider Retry Logic

## Purpose

Implement provider retry logic.

## Scope

- Retry strategy
- Backoff
- Limits

## Implementation

1. Define strategy
2. Implement backoff
3. Add limits

## Acceptance Criteria

1. Strategy defined
2. Backoff works
3. Limits work
